channel.title: VMware Cloud Foundation on MadeMy IT Solutions
channel.description: Recent content in VMware Cloud Foundation on MadeMy IT Solutions

item.title: VMware Aria Suite
item.description:
What is VMware Aria Suite?

VMware Aria Suite (formerly vRealize Suite) is a multi-cloud management platform that helps organizations manage, optimize, and secure cloud resources. It offers a unified approach to cloud management with AI-driven intelligence.

Aria Suite Components

Aria Operations (vRealize Operations) Intelligent operations management:

  • AI-powered Analytics: Automated root cause analysis
  • Capacity Planning: Predictive resource requirement analysis
  • Performance Monitoring: Real-time metrics and dashboards
  • Troubleshooting: Guided remediation workflows

Aria Automation (vRealize Automation) Cloud automation platform:

item.title: VMware SDDC Manager
item.description:
What is SDDC Manager?

SDDC Manager is the central management system for VMware Cloud Foundation. It automates the implementation, configuration, management, and lifecycle of the complete software-defined data center (SDDC) stack - vSphere, vSAN, NSX, and Aria Suite.

SDDC Manager Architecture

Management Plane The brain of VCF:

  • API Server: REST API for external integrations
  • Workflow Engine: Automated deployment workflows
  • Inventory Service: Real-time inventory of all components
  • Health Service: Continuous health monitoring

Control Plane Central orchestration:
